title: Hezbollah Launches Fiber-Optic Drones, Wounds 12 IDF Soldiers Near Lebanon Border

contents:
# Hezbollah Launches Fiber-Optic Drones, Wounds 12 IDF Soldiers Near Lebanon Border

## Overview
Hezbollah conducted drone attacks using advanced fiber-optic guided drones on IDF positions, wounding 12 soldiers and prompting Israeli retaliation.

## Details
A Hezbollah drone struck an artillery carrier near Shomera, causing explosions that injured at least 12 IDF soldiers. The IDF intercepted multiple aerial threats and launched airstrikes on Hezbollah sites in southern Lebanon. Sirens sounded in communities like Misgav Am and Kfar Giladi. Officials remain probing fiber-optic drones, which evade traditional defenses, used since March. Additional strikes hit Western Galilee and a cross-border vehicle.

## Location
Israel-Lebanon border, northern Israel

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @key2med OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
Hezbollah drones, IDF casualties, Israel-Lebanon border, fiber-optic tech, aerial defense
